And I perform <action> on <device type>

||*_device type_*||*_action_*||
||Mobile/Desktop|release playhead|
||CTV|Pressing OK/Select|
stepDetails.step_5: Then playback session will resume again from the new position in the Seek bar (see clarification for step 5 above)

expectedResults.step_3:
If the user holds the dpad right or left button for 2 sec, the controls will enter the FFW/RWD mode and we will trigger the FFW/RWD action with speed = 1x (15 sec)
 After that,
 Tapping right jumps you up a speed
 Tapping left jumps you down a speed
 Tapping right once you're already at #4 does nothing
 Tapping left from a 1x speed it would go to 0x = Play i.e normal speed
 Pressing Back during FFW/RWD action, then the current playhead position will be canceled and we will take the user back to the starting point for the FFW/RWD action. (i.e. Cancels the FFW/RWD seek)
expectedResults.step_4: CTV Pressing OK/Select, then the current playhead position will be accepted and the FFW/RWD action will stop.

testcases.normalized_summary: Validates playback session will resume again from the new position in the Seek for open Beam app as an authenticated user when use on _device type__player controls_ Mobile/DesktopDrag the playhead.
